/usr/bin/ar qc libWWSaveLoad.a CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/definition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/definitionfactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/definitionfactorymgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/definitionmgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/parameter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/persistfactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/pointerremap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/saveload.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/saveloadstatus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/saveloadsubsystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/twiddler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWSaveLoad.dir/wwsaveload.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libWWSaveLoad.a
